name: io.github.xixihhhh/clipforge
description: Drive ClipForge's keyless short-video pipeline (script → free stock footage → free TTS → captions → BGM → FFmpeg compose) from any MCP client — one sentence or a product link becomes a finished vertical video.

environmentVariables.name: CLIPFORGE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the running ClipForge instance (default http://localhost:3000; start it with `pnpm dev` or `pnpm start`)

environmentVariables.name: CLIPFORGE_LLM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint for script generation (optional — footage and voiceover are keyless without it)

environmentVariables.name: CLIPFORGE_LLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the LLM endpoint (optional, only needed for script generation)

environmentVariables.name: CLIPFORGE_LLM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: LLM model id for script generation (optional, e.g. deepseek-ai/deepseek-v3.2)
